panel_used: Top-left quadrant: 'young mice' cladogram, 'After 10 days of Abx treatment' row (legend: red = young before Abx, green = young after Abx), matching group_0/group_1 for this entry. The other three quadrants (older mice, and both 6-month-recovery panels) were ignored as they compare different group pairs.
color_map: Red = young before Abx (group_0); green = young after Abx (group_1), per the panel legend and letter-key coloring (each lettered taxon label a-l is itself printed in red or green matching its enriched group).
notes: The letter-key legend (a-l) is color-coded per taxon (green fill = enriched after Abx/group_1, red fill = enriched before Abx/group_0), directly readable without needing to trace cladogram wedge positions. 'Candidatus_Stoquefichus' text is truncated at the image right edge (reads 'Candidatus_Stoquefichu...') but unambiguously resolves to this genus name.
